_note: SYNTHETIC recorded-shape Open Legislation response for statute-capture unit tests. PLACEHOLDER content, NOT NY statute text; single-paragraph section (no numbered subdivisions) to exercise the implicit-single-subdivision path. Never promote to golden.

result.text:
§ 25-a. Placeholder deadline extension. Where the last day for
  the performance of a placeholder act falls on a Saturday,
  Sunday or public holiday, such act may be done on the next
  succeeding business day, for formatter testing only.
result.title: Placeholder deadline extension
